faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Jericho typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your home, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, plus warranty options for long-term protection.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in Jericho, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Jericho primarily deals with Eastern subterranean termites, which live in soil and build mud tubes to access wooden structures. These termites are active year-round but swarm in spring, making early detection crucial for Jericho homeowners to prevent extensive damage.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Jericho homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Jericho are completed in one day, typically taking 3-6 hours depending on your property size and treatment method. Liquid treatments and bait systems may require follow-up visits, and we provide monitoring to ensure complete colony elimination.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite inspections before buying a home in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide pre-purchase termite inspections throughout Jericho and can coordinate with your real estate timeline. Our detailed reports meet lending requirements and help you make informed decisions about your Long Island property investment, with treatment recommendations if issues are found.
